data.goal: Establish initial coverage across 4 core categories: user-capability, api-layer, data-layer, and ui-presentation
data.rationale: Fresh discovery start with all 7 categories at 0% coverage. Following breadth-first strategy, targeting the 4 most fundamental categories first to understand the React app structure. Will cover remaining 3 categories (integration, infrastructure, platform) in subsequent cycles.
successCriteria: Identify at least 5 user-facing features or capabilities
Discover the primary API communication patterns (REST/GraphQL endpoints, state management)
Map data flow architecture (Redux/Zustand/Context, local storage, caching)
Catalog main UI components and presentation patterns
constraints: Allocate one subagent per category minimum
Shallow exploration only - identify and list, don't trace deeply yet
Focus on src/ directory as primary source
Stay within token budget for initial broad sweep
data.summary: Starting fresh discovery on React CRM frontend. All 7 categories need exploration - covering 4 core categories this cycle, 3 remaining next cycle.
explorationQuestions: What are the main user workflows and features in this CRM?
How does the frontend communicate with backend APIs?
What state management solution is used for data flow?
What are the primary UI components and design patterns?

subagents.task: Identify main user workflows in this CRM. Scan pages, components, and forms to list: what users can do (create contacts, manage deals, etc.), entry points for each workflow, and key interactive elements. Focus on business capabilities, not technical implementation.

Map how frontend communicates with backend APIs. Identify: API client setup, endpoint patterns, request/response handling, authentication flow. Look for axios configs, fetch wrappers, or API service modules.
Identify state management solution and data flow patterns. Look for: Redux/Zustand stores, Context providers, local state patterns, data fetching strategies. List key stores and their purposes.

Catalog primary UI components and design patterns. Identify: component library structure, reusable UI elements, styling approach (CSS modules/styled-components/Tailwind), layout patterns. Focus on the design system foundation.

expectedOutputs: List of main CRM workflows and user capabilities
State management solution and store inventory
UI component library and design pattern catalog

discoveredItems.name: Create Customer
discoveredItems.description: Create new customers with contact info, financial settings (charge rate, currency), and database credentials. Syncs to both FileMaker and Supabase.

discoveredItems.name: Create Prospect
discoveredItems.description: Create or update sales prospects with contact details, industry, and full address information for marketing outreach.

discoveredItems.name: Convert Prospect to Customer
discoveredItems.description: Convert qualified prospects into full customers with validation warnings and confirmation workflow.

discoveredItems.name: Create Project
discoveredItems.description: Create projects for customers with different billing types: billable (hourly), fixed cost, or subscription with monthly fees.

discoveredItems.name: Manage Project Status
discoveredItems.description: Toggle projects between Open and Closed status, and delete projects with confirmation dialog.

discoveredItems.name: Task Time Tracking
discoveredItems.description: Start, pause, resume, and stop timers on tasks to track billable hours with adjustment capabilities.

discoveredItems.name: Task Management
discoveredItems.description: View tasks, expand for details, manage task status, and add notes and links to tasks within projects.

discoveredItems.name: Create Proposal
discoveredItems.description: Create project proposals with title, description, objectives, timeline, budget, and deliverables with pricing.

discoveredItems.name: Enhanced Proposal Creation
discoveredItems.description: Advanced proposal creation with multi-tab interface, packages, deliverables, and source document management.

discoveredItems.name: Create Team
discoveredItems.description: Create new teams to organize staff members and assign them to projects.

discoveredItems.name: Manage Team Staff
discoveredItems.description: Add and remove staff members from teams, view team projects, and manage team assignments.

discoveredItems.name: Create Product
discoveredItems.description: Create products with pricing, subscription options, included units, and overage rates for sales.

discoveredItems.name: Manage Product
discoveredItems.description: View, edit, and delete products with related products section and product requirements management.

discoveredItems.name: Record Sale
discoveredItems.description: Record product sales for customers with quantity, pricing, date, and notes.

discoveredItems.name: Edit Sales Record
discoveredItems.description: Edit existing sales records with validation and targeted update capability.

discoveredItems.name: Create QuickBooks Customer
discoveredItems.description: Create customers in QuickBooks Online with currency selection and contact information sync.

discoveredItems.name: Financial Sync
discoveredItems.description: Synchronize financial records between devRecords and customer_sales with date range selection and preview.

discoveredItems.name: Email Marketing Campaign
discoveredItems.description: Send bulk email campaigns for information sessions with eligible customer filtering and CSV import.

discoveredItems.name: Customer Activity Report
discoveredItems.description: Generate and view customer activity reports with timeframe selection, email export, and record editing.

discoveredItems.name: Create GitHub File
discoveredItems.description: Create new files in GitHub repositories with content editor, file upload mode, and commit messages.

discoveredItems.name: Customer Details View
discoveredItems.description: View customer information, projects, sales stats, unbilled hours, and manage customer-related actions.

discoveredItems.name: Prospect Details View
discoveredItems.description: View prospect information with touch history, email campaigns, and project management tabs.

discoveredItems.name: dataService
discoveredItems.description: Environment-aware axios client that routes requests based on FileMaker vs WebApp context. Creates axios instance with request/response interceptors that add HMAC auth for webapp or route through FileMaker bridge.

discoveredItems.name: supabaseService
discoveredItems.description: Supabase client singleton using @supabase/supabase-js. Provides unified client with PKCE auth flow and HMAC auth for backend API calls. Used for direct Supabase table operations.

discoveredItems.name: backendConfig
discoveredItems.description: Central configuration for backend API URLs. Exports baseUrl (api.claritybusinesssolutions.ca), fileMakerApiUrl, and quickBooksApiUrl.

discoveredItems.name: generateBackendAuthHeader
discoveredItems.description: HMAC-SHA256 authentication header generator using Web Crypto API. Format: Bearer {signatureHex}.{timestamp}. Uses VITE_SECRET_KEY env var. Implemented in multiple files.

discoveredItems.name: fileMakerApi
discoveredItems.description: FileMaker Data API client that routes requests through backend. Supports read/create/update/delete actions on layouts. Uses fm-gofer for WebViewer bridge or axios for backend API.

discoveredItems.name: fileMakerEdgeFunction
discoveredItems.description: DEPRECATED FileMaker edge function client using fetch. Direct HMAC-authenticated requests to /filemaker/* endpoints for records, scripts, and containers.

discoveredItems.name: proposalsApi
discoveredItems.description: Proposal API module using axios with HMAC auth. Endpoints: /proposals/, /proposals/project/{id}, /proposals/token/{token}, /proposals/{id}/concepts, /proposals/{id}/deliverables, /proposals/{id}/approve.

discoveredItems.name: proposalExtendedApi
discoveredItems.description: Extended proposal API module with centralized apiRequest() wrapper. Uses axios with HMAC auth for packages, requirements, and deliverables operations.

discoveredItems.name: quickbooksApi
discoveredItems.description: QuickBooks Online API client using fetch. HMAC-authenticated requests to /quickbooks/* endpoints. Supports OAuth flow, customers, invoices, bills, items, vendors, and webhooks.

discoveredItems.name: prospectsApi
discoveredItems.description: Prospects API using direct Supabase client. CRUD operations on customers table filtered by type='PROSPECT'. Handles related tables: customer_email, customer_phone, customer_address.

discoveredItems.name: marketingApi
discoveredItems.description: Marketing API for bulk email operations using fetch. HMAC-authenticated requests for email campaigns. Includes CSV parsing for recipient lists.

discoveredItems.name: mailjetApi
discoveredItems.description: Mailjet email API using axios. HMAC-authenticated POST to /mailjet/send-email endpoint. Validates email addresses and formats payload.

discoveredItems.name: customersApi
discoveredItems.description: Customer CRUD operations using fileMaker.js abstraction. Wraps handleFileMakerOperation() for fetchCustomers, fetchCustomerById, updateCustomer, createCustomer.

discoveredItems.name: githubApi
discoveredItems.description: GitHub API client reusing dataService (axios with HMAC auth). Repository operations: validate, check exists, create, get contents, file CRUD, folder creation.

discoveredItems.name: apiIndex
discoveredItems.description: Central API export module re-exporting all API functions from fileMaker, customers, teams, projects, tasks modules.

discoveredItems.name: Redux Store Configuration
discoveredItems.description: Central Redux Toolkit store configuration combining proposal, proposalViewer, and documentation slices

discoveredItems.name: Proposal Redux Slice
discoveredItems.description: Redux slice managing proposal CRUD operations with async thunks for API integration, handles creating, fetching, and emailing proposals

discoveredItems.name: Proposal Viewer Redux Slice
discoveredItems.description: Redux slice for customer-facing proposal viewing, handles deliverable selection, pricing calculations, and proposal approval workflow

discoveredItems.name: Documentation Redux Slice
discoveredItems.description: Redux slice for GitHub repository documentation management, handles file CRUD operations with GitHub API integration

discoveredItems.name: AppStateContext
discoveredItems.description: Central React Context with useReducer for global app state including authentication, environment detection, selected entities (customer/project/task/team), UI states, and sidebar mode

discoveredItems.name: TeamContext
discoveredItems.description: React Context provider wrapping useTeam hook, provides team management state and operations including staff assignments and project associations

discoveredItems.name: MarketingContext
discoveredItems.description: React Context for marketing domain management, integrates with AppStateContext dispatch for marketing-related state updates

discoveredItems.name: ProjectContext
discoveredItems.description: React Context for project records management, fetches project records from FileMaker on mount using recordQueueManager

discoveredItems.name: SnackBarContext
discoveredItems.description: React Context for global notification/toast system, provides showError, showSuccess, showInfo methods for app-wide notifications

discoveredItems.name: useCustomer Hook
discoveredItems.description: Custom hook for customer state management with local useState, handles CRUD operations with dual-write to FileMaker and Supabase

discoveredItems.name: useProject Hook
discoveredItems.description: Custom hook for project state management, handles project CRUD with FileMaker and Supabase sync, includes objective creation and team assignment

discoveredItems.name: useTeam Hook
discoveredItems.description: Custom hook for team state management, handles team CRUD, staff assignments, and project associations with FileMaker API

discoveredItems.name: useFileMakerBridge Hook
discoveredItems.description: Custom hook for FileMaker WebViewer bridge detection and connection status with retry logic

discoveredItems.name: useLoadingState Hook
discoveredItems.description: Utility hook for managing loading and error states, provides startLoading, stopLoading, and clearError methods

discoveredItems.name: useSelection Hook
discoveredItems.description: Utility hook for managing selection state with optional callback on select

discoveredItems.name: useFormState Hook
discoveredItems.description: Utility hook for managing form state with validation support, provides handleChange, validateForm, and resetForm methods

discoveredItems.name: usePagination Hook
discoveredItems.description: Utility hook for managing client-side pagination with page navigation methods

discoveredItems.name: useSorting Hook
discoveredItems.description: Utility hook for managing sorting state with toggleSort and sortItems methods

discoveredItems.name: useFilters Hook
discoveredItems.description: Utility hook for managing filter state with applyFilter, clearFilter, and filterItems methods

discoveredItems.name: useTask Hook
discoveredItems.description: Custom hook for task state management (referenced but not fully read)

discoveredItems.name: useProducts Hook
discoveredItems.description: Custom hook for products state management (referenced but not fully read)

discoveredItems.name: useSales Hook
discoveredItems.description: Custom hook for sales state management (referenced but not fully read)

discoveredItems.name: useProspect Hook
discoveredItems.description: Custom hook for prospect state management with Supabase integration (referenced but not fully read)

discoveredItems.name: useProposalExtended Hook
discoveredItems.description: Custom hook for extended proposal system with packages and deliverables (referenced but not fully read)

discoveredItems.name: useFinancialSync Hook
discoveredItems.description: Custom hook for QuickBooks financial synchronization (referenced but not fully read)

discoveredItems.name: Tailwind CSS Configuration
discoveredItems.description: Primary styling approach using Tailwind CSS with @tailwind directives in style.css. Dark mode supported via 'dark:' prefix classes.

discoveredItems.name: Theme System
discoveredItems.description: Dual theme system with lightTheme and darkTheme objects for styled-components integration. Includes colors, shadows, radius, and transitions.

discoveredItems.name: ThemeProvider
discoveredItems.description: React context provider for dark mode management. Auto-detects system preference, toggles 'dark' class on html element, integrates with styled-components.

discoveredItems.name: AppLayout
discoveredItems.description: Main layout component with sticky top nav, 64-width sidebar, and flexible main content area. Flex-based layout structure.

discoveredItems.name: TopNav
discoveredItems.description: Top navigation bar with logo, navigation buttons (Prospects, Customers, Products, Teams, Marketing), and user profile with hover-reveal logout.

discoveredItems.name: Sidebar
discoveredItems.description: Navigation sidebar with customer/prospect/product lists. Contains memoized list item components (CustomerListItem, ProductListItem) with dark mode support.

discoveredItems.name: SnackBar
discoveredItems.description: Toast notification component. Fixed position at bottom center, supports error/success/info types with color-coded backgrounds, auto-dismisses after 3 seconds.

discoveredItems.name: SnackBarContext
discoveredItems.description: Context provider for global notifications. Provides showError, showSuccess, showInfo methods throughout the app.

discoveredItems.name: LoadingSpinner
discoveredItems.description: Animated CSS spinner with size variants (sm/md/lg). Supports Tailwind color classes or custom hex/rgb colors.

discoveredItems.name: Loading
discoveredItems.description: Loading indicator wrapper combining LoadingSpinner with optional message text. Centered flex layout with spacing.

discoveredItems.name: ProgressBar
discoveredItems.description: Progress indicator with manager subscription pattern. Shows percentage, customizable color, animated width transitions.

discoveredItems.name: ErrorBoundary
discoveredItems.description: React error boundary with retry functionality. Shows error message, stack trace in dev mode, integrates with loadingStateManager and SnackBar for non-critical errors.

discoveredItems.name: TextInput Modal
discoveredItems.description: Modal dialog with textarea input. Dark mode aware, includes submit/cancel buttons, disabled state for empty input.

discoveredItems.name: Modal Pattern
discoveredItems.description: Standard modal pattern: fixed inset-0 with black bg-opacity-50 overlay, centered flex container, rounded-lg content with header, body, and footer sections.

discoveredItems.name: ProjectCard
discoveredItems.description: Clickable card component for project display. Shows project name, status badge, type badge (Fixed Cost/Subscription/Billable), and date info.

discoveredItems.name: Badge Pattern
discoveredItems.description: Status and type badges using px-2 py-1 text-xs/sm rounded-full with color-coded backgrounds for dark/light modes.

discoveredItems.name: Tab Pattern
discoveredItems.description: Tab navigation with underline indicator. Uses relative positioning with absolute bottom-0 indicator bar, transitions on selection.

discoveredItems.name: TaskTimer
discoveredItems.description: Time tracking widget with start/pause/resume/stop controls, elapsed time display, time adjustment buttons, and stop dialog with description input.

discoveredItems.name: TimerControls
discoveredItems.description: Memoized control buttons for timer. Green start, yellow pause, blue resume, red stop buttons with consistent styling.

discoveredItems.name: ProjectReportButton
discoveredItems.description: Async action button with loading state. Shows spinner during PDF generation, disabled when loading, customizable children.

discoveredItems.name: Button Patterns
discoveredItems.description: Multiple button styles: primary (bg-blue-500/bg-primary), success (bg-green-600), warning (bg-yellow-600), danger (bg-red-600), neutral (bg-gray-200/700 dark mode).

discoveredItems.name: Form Input Pattern
discoveredItems.description: Standard form inputs with dark mode support. Uses px-3 py-2 border rounded-md, focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-500, dark mode bg-gray-700 border-gray-600.

discoveredItems.name: Form Validation Pattern
discoveredItems.description: Client-side validation with errors state object. Error messages shown in red text below inputs, border-red-500 on invalid fields.

discoveredItems.name: SignIn
discoveredItems.description: Authentication component with FileMaker auto-detection and Supabase email/password form. Environment-aware authentication flow.

discoveredItems.name: CustomerForm
discoveredItems.description: Multi-field form for customer creation. Includes text inputs, checkboxes, number inputs with controlled state and validation.

discoveredItems.name: RepositoryConfigModal
discoveredItems.description: Configuration modal with radio button input method selection, form validation, live URL preview, and action buttons.

discoveredItems.name: SourceDocumentsManager
discoveredItems.description: Document management component with repository integration. Uses Redux for state, includes add/config modals.

discoveredItems.name: Table Pattern
discoveredItems.description: Data tables with divide-y dividers, themed headers (bg-gray-700/bg-gray-50), expandable rows, and consistent cell padding (px-6 py-3/4).

discoveredItems.name: Icon Buttons
discoveredItems.description: Circular icon buttons (w-8 h-8 rounded-full) with hover states. Uses inline SVG icons with currentColor fill.

discoveredItems.name: MainContent
discoveredItems.description: Central routing component that renders different detail views (Project, Customer, Prospect, Team, Product) based on selection state.

discoveredItems.name: Slider Toggle
discoveredItems.description: Custom CSS toggle switch. 40x20px slider with rounded corners, smooth transition, and themed colors.

nextCycleSuggestions: Retry synthesis with more focused subagents

data.goal: Expand coverage to 4 unexplored categories: ui-presentation, api-layer, data-layer, and infrastructure
data.rationale: 6 of 7 categories remain completely unexplored (0% coverage). Must achieve breadth before deepening user-capability. These 4 categories represent core app architecture (UI, API, data, infrastructure) and will provide foundation for understanding the 92 discovered user capabilities.
successCriteria: ui-presentation: Identify at least 5 UI components and their organization patterns
api-layer: Discover primary API communication patterns and key endpoints
data-layer: Map state management approach and data flow patterns
infrastructure: Identify authentication, routing, and error handling mechanisms
constraints: Do NOT deepen user-capability features yet - breadth first
Focus on identifying what exists, not tracing deeply
data.summary: Strong user-capability discovery (92 features) but 6 categories unexplored. Must establish breadth across all categories before deepening any single area.
explorationQuestions: What UI component library and structure is used?
How does the frontend communicate with backend services?
Where and how is application state managed?
What authentication and routing infrastructure exists?

subagents.task: Identify the UI component library used (Material-UI, Ant Design, custom, etc.) and catalog the component structure. Note: shared components, layout components, form components, and styling approach. Focus on what UI framework/library powers the interface.

Identify how the frontend communicates with backend services. Find: API client setup, base URLs, request/response handling, error handling patterns. Look for axios, fetch wrappers, or API service modules.
Identify state management approach and structure. Find: Redux stores, Context providers, local state patterns, state management library used. Note how application data flows and is stored.

Identify authentication system and routing setup. Find: auth providers, protected routes, login/logout mechanisms, route definitions. Note what routing library is used and how authentication is handled.

expectedOutputs: UI component library and structure inventory

discoveredItems.name: Tailwind CSS Framework
discoveredItems.description: Primary styling framework using utility-first CSS classes with dark mode support via dark: prefix

discoveredItems.name: styled-components Library
discoveredItems.description: CSS-in-JS library for component-level theming, primarily used in proposal components

discoveredItems.name: Theme Configuration
discoveredItems.description: Light and dark theme objects with colors, shadows, radius, and transitions for styled-components

discoveredItems.name: Heroicons React
discoveredItems.description: Icon library from Tailwind Labs, used sparingly in components like SourceDocumentsList

discoveredItems.name: ThemeProvider
discoveredItems.description: Context-based theme management with dark mode toggle, integrates styled-components StyledThemeProvider

discoveredItems.name: AppLayout
discoveredItems.description: Main layout component wrapping TopNav and children, provides dark mode context

discoveredItems.name: Sidebar
discoveredItems.description: Navigation sidebar with customer, prospect, product, and team list items using Tailwind classes

discoveredItems.name: TopNav
discoveredItems.description: Top navigation bar with mode toggles (customer, prospect, product, team, marketing) and user info

discoveredItems.name: MainContent
discoveredItems.description: Content router component that renders appropriate detail views based on sidebar mode and selection

discoveredItems.name: TextInput
discoveredItems.description: Modal text input component with dark mode support using Tailwind utility classes

discoveredItems.name: SnackBar
discoveredItems.description: Global notification toast component with success/info/error variants using Tailwind colors

discoveredItems.name: LoadingSpinner
discoveredItems.description: Animated spinner component with size variants (sm/md/lg) using Tailwind animation classes

discoveredItems.name: ProgressBar

discoveredItems.name: ErrorBoundary
discoveredItems.description: React error boundary with dark mode fallback UI using Tailwind classes

discoveredItems.name: SummaryTab
discoveredItems.description: Proposal summary component using styled-components with theme-based styling for package cards

discoveredItems.name: RepositoryConfigModal
discoveredItems.description: GitHub repository configuration modal using Tailwind-styled form elements

discoveredItems.name: SourceDocumentsManager
discoveredItems.description: Standalone source document management component with Redux integration

discoveredItems.name: SignIn
discoveredItems.description: Authentication component with environment detection for FileMaker vs Supabase auth

discoveredItems.name: TaskList
discoveredItems.description: Task listing component with expandable items, timer integration, using Tailwind classes

discoveredItems.name: FinancialChart
discoveredItems.description: Chart.js wrapper component with react-chartjs-2 for bar and line financial charts

discoveredItems.name: ProductForm
discoveredItems.description: Product creation/edit form with subscription and pricing fields using Tailwind classes

discoveredItems.name: Chart.js Integration
discoveredItems.description: Chart.js with react-chartjs-2 wrapper for data visualization in financial components

discoveredItems.name: Redux Toolkit State
discoveredItems.description: Redux Toolkit with react-redux for complex state in proposals and documentation

discoveredItems.name: dataService
discoveredItems.description: Environment-aware data service that routes requests based on current environment (FileMaker vs Web App). Creates axios client with HMAC-SHA256 auth and interceptors for environment-aware routing.

discoveredItems.name: backendConfig
discoveredItems.description: Central configuration for backend API base URLs including main API, FileMaker API, and QuickBooks API endpoints at api.claritybusinesssolutions.ca

discoveredItems.name: hmacAuthHeader
discoveredItems.description: HMAC-SHA256 authentication header generator using Web Crypto API. Format: Bearer {signature}.{timestamp} where message = timestamp.payload. Used across all backend API modules.

discoveredItems.name: supabaseService
discoveredItems.description: Supabase service that routes calls through backend API (api.claritybusinesssolutions.ca). Supports select, insert, update, delete operations with HMAC authentication and filter mapping.

discoveredItems.name: fileMakerApiClient
discoveredItems.description: FileMaker API client using axios. Routes through backend API for web app or uses FMGofer bridge for FileMaker environment. Supports CRUD, find, and script execution operations.

discoveredItems.name: quickbooksApiClient
discoveredItems.description: QuickBooks Online API client using native fetch. Connects to backend at api.claritybusinesssolutions.ca/quickbooks. Includes comprehensive error handling with status codes and response data parsing.

discoveredItems.name: proposalsApiClient
discoveredItems.description: Proposals API module using axios with HMAC auth. Handles proposal CRUD, deliverables, concepts, and approval workflows via backend API.

discoveredItems.name: proposalExtendedApi
discoveredItems.description: Extended proposal API with apiRequest wrapper function. Handles requirements, packages, package-deliverable associations, and complete package creation flows.

discoveredItems.name: marketingApiClient
discoveredItems.description: Marketing API for bulk email operations using native fetch. Includes CSV parsing, HMAC signature creation, and email template validation.

discoveredItems.name: prospectsApiClient
discoveredItems.description: Prospects API using direct Supabase client (not backend routed). Handles PROSPECT type customers with normalized data across related tables (email, phone, address, settings).

discoveredItems.name: axiosClientInterceptors
discoveredItems.description: Axios request/response interceptors in dataService. Request interceptor adds HMAC auth for webapp or marks for FileMaker routing. Response interceptor handles FileMaker conversion.

discoveredItems.name: errorHandlingPatterns
discoveredItems.description: Consistent error handling across API modules. Extracts error messages from response.data.detail, message, error fields. Returns {success: false, error: message} or throws enriched Error objects.

discoveredItems.name: apiIndexExports
discoveredItems.description: Central API export module re-exporting all domain-specific API functions from customers, teams, projects, tasks, financialRecords, and QuickBooks modules.

discoveredItems.name: fileMakerEdgeFunction
discoveredItems.description: DEPRECATED FileMaker edge function client using native fetch. Direct calls to api.claritybusinesssolutions.ca/filemaker endpoints for records, scripts, and container operations.

discoveredItems.name: fileMakerOperationWrapper
discoveredItems.description: handleFileMakerOperation wrapper function that provides consistent error handling for FileMaker operations. Used by domain API modules (customers, projects, tasks).

discoveredItems.name: layoutAndActionConstants
discoveredItems.description: Exported Layouts and Actions constants for FileMaker API. Layouts: CUSTOMERS, PROJECTS, TASKS, STAFF, etc. Actions: READ, CREATE, UPDATE, DELETE.

discoveredItems.name: Redux Store Configuration
discoveredItems.description: Redux Toolkit store with 3 slices: proposals, proposalViewer, documentation. Uses configureStore with devTools enabled in development.

discoveredItems.name: Proposal Redux Slice
discoveredItems.description: Redux slice for proposal CRUD operations with async thunks for create, fetch, and email sending. Manages proposals array, currentProposal, and loading states.

discoveredItems.name: Proposal Viewer Redux Slice
discoveredItems.description: Redux slice for proposal viewing and approval workflow. Manages selected deliverables, price calculations, and approval states with toggleDeliverable action.

discoveredItems.name: Documentation Redux Slice
discoveredItems.description: Redux slice for GitHub repository documentation management. Handles file/folder CRUD operations, content caching, and navigation state.

discoveredItems.name: AppStateContext
discoveredItems.description: Central React Context using useReducer for app-wide state. Manages user, selections (customer/prospect/project/task/team/product), authentication, environment detection, sidebar mode, and UI visibility flags.

discoveredItems.name: TeamContext
discoveredItems.description: React Context provider wrapping useTeam hook. Exposes team state (teams, staff, projects, stats) and operations (CRUD, staff/project assignment).

discoveredItems.name: ProjectContext
discoveredItems.description: React Context for project records fetched from FileMaker. Uses useState with useRef for fetch-once pattern via recordQueueManager.

discoveredItems.name: MarketingContext
discoveredItems.description: React Context for marketing domains and campaigns. Delegates state to AppStateContext, provides local marketingDomains array and dispatch wrappers.

discoveredItems.name: SnackBarContext
discoveredItems.description: React Context for global notifications using useState. Provides showError, showSuccess, showInfo methods and renders SnackBar component.

discoveredItems.name: SignIn Component
discoveredItems.description: Authentication component handling dual-environment login (FileMaker bridge and Supabase email/password)

discoveredItems.name: Supabase Auth Service
discoveredItems.description: Supabase authentication service providing signInWithEmail and signOut functions using @supabase/supabase-js

discoveredItems.name: Environment Context
discoveredItems.description: Environment type constants and context setter for routing between FileMaker and webapp modes

discoveredItems.name: AppStateContext Authentication
discoveredItems.description: React context managing authentication state (isAuthenticated, user, method) and environment detection

discoveredItems.name: App Authentication Flow
discoveredItems.description: Main app entry point handling authentication callbacks and conditional rendering of SignIn or main content

discoveredItems.name: Protected Content Gate
discoveredItems.description: Authentication check in AppContent that renders SignIn if not authenticated, otherwise renders main layout

discoveredItems.name: Logout Handler
discoveredItems.description: Logout function in TopNav that resets application state and reloads the page

discoveredItems.name: MainContent View Router
discoveredItems.description: Conditional rendering component that switches between CustomerDetails, ProspectDetails, TeamDetails, ProductDetails, MarketingPanel based on sidebarMode and selected entities

discoveredItems.name: HMAC Backend Authentication
discoveredItems.description: HMAC-SHA256 authentication header generation for backend API requests using Web Crypto API

nextCycleSuggestions: Deep trace specific user workflows (task management, proposal creation)
Investigate integration patterns between Redux and Context states
Explore user-capability features that leverage this infrastructure
Map data flows between API clients and state management systems

data.goal: Expand coverage to unexplored categories: ui-presentation, data-layer, and platform while addressing api-layer and infrastructure gaps
data.rationale: 4 of 7 categories remain unexplored (ui-presentation, data-layer, platform at 0%, plus api-layer and infrastructure at LOW). Must prioritize breadth-first exploration before deepening user-capability. Current cycle should focus on these unexplored categories to establish baseline coverage.
successCriteria: ui-presentation: Identify component library structure, theme system, and layout patterns
data-layer: Map Redux store structure, state management patterns, and data persistence
platform: Discover build configuration, deployment setup, and development tooling
api-layer: Find REST/GraphQL clients, request patterns, and response handling
infrastructure: Identify auth systems, error handling, and logging infrastructure
constraints: Do NOT deepen user-capability until other categories have coverage
Focus on discovering what exists rather than tracing flows
data.summary: Good progress on user-capability (129 features) but 4 categories remain unexplored. Must achieve breadth across all 7 categories before deepening any single category.
explorationQuestions: What UI components and design system exist?
How is application state structured in Redux/Context?
What build tools and deployment configuration are used?
Which API clients handle data fetching?
What authentication and error handling infrastructure exists?

subagents.task: Identify all UI components in the design system. For each component, note: component name, props interface, styling approach (CSS modules/styled-components/etc), reusability level. Focus on shared/reusable components, not page-specific ones.

Identify state management approach and structure. Look for Redux stores, Context providers, state slices, reducers, selectors. For each store/context, note: name, data shape, actions/mutations available.

Identify build and deployment setup. Examine package.json scripts, webpack/vite config, build tools, environment configuration, deployment scripts. Note: bundler type, build commands, environment variables, deployment targets.

subagents.focusArea: Data fetching and API client modules
subagents.task: Identify API client setup and data fetching patterns. Look for axios instances, fetch wrappers, API service modules, endpoint configurations. For each client, note: base URL setup, interceptors, error handling, request/response transformation.

Identify authentication mechanisms and error handling infrastructure. Look for auth providers, login/logout logic, protected route components, error boundaries, global error handlers. Note: auth method (JWT/session), error handling strategy, protected route implementation.

expectedOutputs: UI component inventory with design system structure
API client modules and fetching patterns

discoveredItems.name: Redux Store Configuration
discoveredItems.description: Central Redux store configured with Redux Toolkit, combining proposal, proposalViewer, and documentation reducers. Uses configureStore with serializable check middleware and dev tools.

discoveredItems.name: Proposal Slice
discoveredItems.description: Redux slice for proposal management with async thunks for createProposal, fetchProposalsForProject, sendProposalEmail. State shape: { proposals, currentProposal, loading, creating, sending, error }. Actions: clearError. Selectors: selectProposalCreating, selectProposalError, selectProposals, selectCurrentProposal.

discoveredItems.name: Proposal Viewer Slice
discoveredItems.description: Redux slice for proposal viewing and approval. State shape: { proposal, selectedDeliverables, totalPrice, loading, approving, error, approvalError }. Async thunks: fetchProposalByToken, approveProposal. Actions: clearError, toggleDeliverable, resetViewer. Multiple selectors for viewer state.

discoveredItems.name: Documentation Slice
discoveredItems.description: Redux slice for GitHub repository documentation management. State shape: { contents, contentsLoading, contentsError, files, fileLoading, fileError, fileOperationLoading, fileOperationError, lastOperation, selectedFile, currentPath, currentRepo }. Async thunks: fetchRepositoryContents, fetchFileContent, createRepositoryFile, updateRepositoryFile, deleteRepositoryFile, createRepositoryFolder. Multiple actions for clearing errors and setting selections.

discoveredItems.name: AppState Context
discoveredItems.description: Central React Context using useReducer pattern. State shape includes: loading, error, user, selectedCustomer/Project/Task/Team/Product/Sale/Prospect, customerDetails, UI toggles (showFinancialActivity, showFileMakerExample, etc.), sidebarMode, products, sales, authentication { isAuthenticated, user, method }, environment { type, detectionComplete }. 30+ action types in APP_ACTIONS. Exports useAppState, useAppDispatch, useAppStateOperations hooks.

discoveredItems.name: Team Context
discoveredItems.description: React Context wrapping useTeam hook. Exposes state: teams, loading, error, selectedTeam, teamStaff, teamProjects, allStaff, stats. Actions: loadTeams, loadAllStaff, handleTeamSelect/Create/Update/Delete, handleAssignStaffToTeam, handleRemoveStaffFromTeam, handleAssignProjectToTeam, handleRemoveProjectFromTeam, clearError, clearSelectedTeam.

discoveredItems.name: Project Context
discoveredItems.description: React Context for FileMaker project records. Uses useState with useRef flags to prevent duplicate fetches. State shape: { projectRecords, projectContext }. Fetches records from FileMaker layout on mount using recordQueueManager. Exports useProjectRecords hook.

discoveredItems.name: Marketing Context
discoveredItems.description: React Context for marketing domain management. Uses AppStateContext for dispatch. Exposes local marketingDomains array (email, youtube, linkedin, twitter). State from AppStateContext: selectedMarketingDomain/Focus/Content, showMarketing, loading, error. Actions: setSelectedMarketingDomain/Focus/Content, toggleMarketingDomainStatus, setShowMarketing.

discoveredItems.name: SnackBar Context
discoveredItems.description: React Context for global notification/toast management. Uses useState for notification state { message, type }. Exposes actions: showError, showSuccess, showInfo. Renders SnackBar component when notification exists.

discoveredItems.name: Vite Build System
discoveredItems.description: Vite-based build system with React plugin and single-file output for FileMaker embedding
capabilities: Inline all assets for FileMaker WebViewer deployment

discoveredItems.name: NPM Scripts Configuration
discoveredItems.description: Build and deployment scripts defined in package.json for dev, build, test, and deploy operations

discoveredItems.name: FileMaker Upload Script
discoveredItems.description: Script to upload built HTML to FileMaker server via fmp:// URL protocol
capabilities: Opens FileMaker with built index.html path

discoveredItems.name: Widget Configuration
discoveredItems.description: FileMaker widget deployment configuration with server and upload script settings

discoveredItems.name: Environment Variables Config
discoveredItems.description: VITE_ prefixed environment variables for Supabase, API keys, and feature flags

discoveredItems.name: Jest Test Configuration
discoveredItems.description: Jest testing configuration with jsdom environment and babel transform

discoveredItems.name: Babel Configuration
discoveredItems.description: Babel preset configuration for React and modern JS compilation

discoveredItems.name: PostCSS Configuration
discoveredItems.description: PostCSS config with Tailwind CSS and Autoprefixer plugins

discoveredItems.name: ESLint Configuration
discoveredItems.description: ESLint flat config with React, React Hooks, and React Refresh plugins

discoveredItems.name: Rollup Docs Bundle
discoveredItems.description: Rollup configuration for generating documentation bundle with all source files

discoveredItems.name: CodeQL Security Analysis
discoveredItems.description: GitHub Actions workflow for CodeQL security scanning on push and PRs to main

discoveredItems.name: M2M Auth Test Script
discoveredItems.description: Test script for HMAC-SHA256 M2M authentication with backend API

discoveredItems.name: Financial Sync Script
discoveredItems.description: Manual sync script for billing records from FileMaker to Supabase

discoveredItems.name: Data Service Axios Client
discoveredItems.description: Environment-aware axios client with HMAC-SHA256 auth, request/response interceptors for FileMaker/WebApp routing

discoveredItems.name: Supabase Service Client
discoveredItems.description: Supabase JS client with PKCE auth, session persistence, and backend API routing for CRUD operations
capabilities: Admin operations with service role key

discoveredItems.name: QuickBooks API Client
discoveredItems.description: Native fetch-based client for QuickBooks Online API with HMAC auth, org ID headers, and comprehensive error handling

discoveredItems.name: FileMaker Bridge Client
discoveredItems.description: Dual-mode client supporting both FM-Gofer bridge (WebViewer) and backend API with axios for web app environment
capabilities: Backend API fallback for web app

discoveredItems.name: Proposal Extended API Client
discoveredItems.description: Axios-based API client for proposal system with HMAC auth, standardized error handling, and success/failure response wrapper

discoveredItems.name: Mailjet Email API Client
discoveredItems.description: Axios-based email sending client through backend API with validation and HMAC authentication

discoveredItems.name: GitHub API Client
discoveredItems.description: Minimal client using dataService for repository operations with HMAC auth inherited from data service

discoveredItems.name: Prospects Supabase Client
discoveredItems.description: Direct Supabase JS client for prospects with normalized data structure across customers/email/phone/address tables

discoveredItems.name: Backend Config
discoveredItems.description: Centralized backend API configuration with base URLs for main API, FileMaker, and QuickBooks endpoints

discoveredItems.name: HMAC Auth Header Generator
discoveredItems.description: Web Crypto API-based HMAC-SHA256 signature generator for backend authentication, duplicated across multiple modules
capabilities: Fallback for unavailable Web Crypto API

discoveredItems.name: ErrorBoundary Component
discoveredItems.description: React class-based error boundary that catches component errors, shows fallback UI with retry button, integrates with loadingStateManager and SnackBarContext for non-critical error handling
capabilities: Display fallback UI with error message

discoveredItems.name: SignIn Authentication Component
discoveredItems.description: Dual-environment authentication component that auto-detects FileMaker environment (via window.FMGofer/FileMaker) or presents Supabase email/password login form for web app

discoveredItems.name: Supabase Auth Functions
discoveredItems.description: Authentication functions using Supabase client: signInWithPassword, signOut, getSession. Uses PKCE flow with auto-refresh tokens and persistent sessions

discoveredItems.name: HMAC Backend Auth Header Generator
discoveredItems.description: Generates HMAC-SHA256 authentication headers for backend API requests using Web Crypto API. Format: Bearer {signature}.{timestamp}

discoveredItems.name: Environment Types Constants
discoveredItems.description: Constants defining dual environment types (FILEMAKER, WEBAPP) and authentication methods (FILEMAKER, SUPABASE) for environment-aware routing

discoveredItems.name: Authentication State Management
discoveredItems.description: AppStateContext manages authentication state with isAuthenticated, user, and method fields. Includes setAuthentication and resetState actions for auth flow

discoveredItems.name: SnackBar Error Notification System
discoveredItems.description: Context-based notification system providing showError, showSuccess, showInfo functions for displaying global toast notifications via SnackBar component

discoveredItems.name: TopNav Logout Handler
discoveredItems.description: Logout functionality in TopNav component that resets application state via resetState and reloads page for clean auth state

discoveredItems.name: Loading State Manager
discoveredItems.description: Singleton class managing global loading states with key-based tracking, message support, and listener subscription pattern for UI synchronization
capabilities: Track multiple loading states by key
Clear all states on error recovery

discoveredItems.name: Authentication Gate Pattern
discoveredItems.description: In index.jsx, app renders SignIn component when !isAuthenticated, preventing access to main content. Acts as route protection without dedicated ProtectedRoute component
capabilities: Gate all app content behind auth

gaps: Error: Killed due to budget exceeded

nextCycleSuggestions: Retry synthesis with more focused subagents
